headline: Warner Bros. Discovery Updates the Date and Time of its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc. (the "Company") (Nasdaq: WBD) today announced that it has updated the date and time of its conference call and will report its first quarter 2026 results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026 after the market close. Links to the live webcast of the conference call as well as the earnings materials will be available in the "Investor Relations" section of the Company's website at https://ir.wbd.com/ at approximately 4:00 p.m. ET. headline: Records Undone: Oil, Iran, and an AI Identity Crisis Sink Wall Street
Netflix Pitches ‘Buyback-and-Chill’ Strategy
summary: A first-quarter earnings beat last week was overshadowed by weak second-quarter guidance that suggested growing subscriber churn.
